rationale: Change 2 (sso.proxy.ts) correctly implements the spec. logBedrockUpstreamError is a defensive private method with try/catch that parses the Buffer request body, matches Bedrock-pattern model names, and emits a structured logger.warn with requestId/model/statusCode and an actionable modify_params hint. TypeScript compiles clean, lint passes, commits follow Conventional Commits format. All lens findings are either by design per spec (intentionally broad warn-level pattern) or minor observability notes (5xx also triggers warn; upstream error body not captured in log). Note: the primary fix (modify_params: true in codemie/litellm_config.yaml) is in a separate repo and was not included in this diff. Two deferred, non-blocking observations: (1) 5xx responses also trigger the modify_params hint — already mitigated by the 'If cause is UnsupportedParamsError' inline qualifier; (2) model string interpolated via template literal in the message — low risk since model is not a credential and the guide's sanitizeLogArgs requirement applies to the structured args (which are sanitized via writeToLogFile).

business_review.notes: Change 1 (litellm_config.yaml, codemie repo) — not in this diff.

business_review.text: Requests include valid tools= or handled via modify_params
Fix in correct layer — no manual user patching
Clear actionable error if model can't support compaction
business_review.notes: Structured logger.warn emits model, requestId, statusCode, and 'If cause is UnsupportedParamsError, ensure litellm_settings.modify_params: true' hint. Broad 4xx trigger is intentional per spec.

business_review.text: Regression: compaction still works for other SSO models
business_review.notes: Manual verification required per spec. Code change is guarded to Bedrock-pattern models only.

business_review.text: Logs show model group, provider, LiteLLM settings context
business_review.notes: model (= LiteLLM model group, e.g. qwen.qwen3-coder-480b-a35b-v1), requestId, statusCode, and modify_params hint all logged.

standards_review.notes: Both commits use fix(scope): description format with Refs: EPMCDME-13136 footer.
npm run typecheck exits 0; no lint issues in sso.proxy.ts. Private method follows existing patterns.
model is not a credential; structured args pass through sanitizeLogArgs via writeToLogFile. Guide targets credential/token leakage, which is not present here.
